fields.name: Asset Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the product type that defines the table being a source for the suggested price list lines.

fields.name: Minimum Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default minimum quantity for the suggested lines. If you do not specify minimum qunatity, pricing will apply same price irrespective of quantity.

fields.name: Adjustment Factor
fields.tooltip: Specifies an adjustment factor to multiply the amounts that you want to copy. By entering an adjustment factor, you can increase or decrease the amounts.

fields.name: Rounding Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a rounding method code that you want applied to prices.

fields.name: From Price List Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price list code to copy lines from.

fields.name: Exchange Rate Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date for the currency exchange rate calculations.

fields.name: Copy As New Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the suggested lines will become new lines in the target price list.

fields.name: Force Defaults
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to apply the values of the target price list header to the new lines instead of the values of the price list you are copying.
